commands.command:
<IfModule mod_expires.c>
    ExpiresActive On
    ExpiresByType image/jpg "access plus 1 year"
    ExpiresByType image/jpeg "access plus 1 year"
</IfModule>

commands.command:
1. Sign up for Cloudflare
2. Add your site to Cloudflare
3. Update your DNS nameservers to Cloudflare's
4. Configure settings in Cloudflare dashboard

commands.scenario: Configure Cloudflare CDN for a website

commands.command:
1. Go to AWS CloudFront console
2. Create a new distribution
3. Select the origin domain
4. Configure cache behavior and settings
5. Deploy and update DNS settings
